default.title: Horizon Tech | Software ea Khoebo, Cloud le AI
default.description: Horizon Tech e rala le ho fana ka software ea khoebo, tharollo ea AI, meralo ea motheo ea leru le lihlahisoa tsa dijithale bakeng sa lihlopha tse nang le takatso.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Software ea khoebo, AI / ML, meralo ea motheo ea leru, le phano ea IoT bakeng sa lihlopha tsa lefats'e.

about.title: Mabapi le Horizon Tech | Morero oa Khampani le Sehlopha
about.description: Ithute ka Horizon Tech, thomo ea rona, le hore na re fana ka tharollo ea mahlale a phahameng joang.

team.title: Sehlopha | Boetapele ba Horizon Tech le Litsebi
team.description: Kopana le baenjiniere le baetapele ba hahang software ea khoebo le liforomo tsa leru ho Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Mesebetsi | Haha ka Horizon Tech
careers.description: Hlahloba mesebetsi e bulehileng 'me u holise mosebetsi oa hau le sehlopha sa boenjiniere sa Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Ikopanye le Horizon Tech | Qala projeke ea hau
contact.description: Ikopanye le Horizon Tech ho buisana ka projeke ea hau, litlhoko tsa tekheniki le nako ea ho tsamaisa.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Liphetho tsa Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Bala lithuto tsa linyeoe tsa bareki le liphetho tse fanoeng ke Horizon Tech ho pholletsa le liindasteri.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Temohisiso ea tekheniki, lithuto tsa phano le tataiso ea meralo ho tsoa ho Horizon Tech.

education.title: Thuto | Lisebelisoa tsa ho ithuta tsa Horizon Tech
education.description: Litataiso, litšupiso le lisebelisoa tsa ho ithuta tsa tekheniki ho tsoa ho Horizon Tech.

support.title: Tšehetso | Horizon Tech
support.description: Fumana lisebelisoa tsa tšehetso le likhetho tsa ho ikopanya bakeng sa lits'ebeletso tsa Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Leano la Lekunutu | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Bala leano la lekunutu la Horizon Tech le boitlamo ba ts'ireletso ea data.

terms.title: Lipehelo tsa Ts'ebeletso | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Bala lipehelo tsa ts'ebeletso tsa Horizon Tech bakeng sa sebaka sa rona sa marang-rang le lits'ebeletso.

profile.title: Profil | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Laola profil ea hau ea Horizon Tech, litlhophiso le lintlha tsa ak'haonte.

firstTimeSetup.title: Tlhophiso ea Lekhetlo la Pele | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Tlatsa ak'haonte ea lekhetlo la pele ho Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Password e lebetsoeng | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Khutlisa phihlello ea ak'haonte ea hau ea Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Theha phasewete e ncha bakeng sa ak'haonte ea hau ea Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Netefatsa lengolo-tsoibila | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Netefatsa aterese ea hau ea lengolo-tsoibila ho kenya tšebetsong ak'haonte ea hau ea Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Sehlopha sa Admin | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Sebaka sa ho sebetsa bakeng sa taolo ea sethala sa Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: E sa lumelloang | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Hajoale ha u khone ho fihlella leqephe lena la Horizon Tech.

services.title: Litšebeletso | Horizon Tech
services.description: Hlahloba lits'ebeletso tsa Horizon Tech ho boenjiniere ba software, AI, leru, DevOps le phetoho ea dijithale.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Sheba liteko tsa Horizon Tech le li-prototypes ho AI le boenjiniere bo sebelisitsoeng.

authCallback.title: Ho kena | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Tlatsa ho saena ka mokhoa o sireletsehileng bakeng sa ak'haonte ea hau ea Horizon Tech.
